display.name: ASP .NET Core Metrics
display.description: ASP.NET Core application metrics — request performance, process health, .NET runtime internals (GC, threading), and routing. Based on OTLP instrumentation.

display.name: deployment.environment
display.description: Deployment environment

spec.queryValue: SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment') AS `deployment.environment` FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day WHERE metric_name = 'http.server.request.duration.count' GROUP BY `deployment.environment`

display.name: service.name
display.description: ASP.NET service name

spec.queryValue: SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'service.name') AS `service.name` FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day WHERE metric_name = 'http.server.request.duration.count' AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment') = $deployment.environment GROUP BY `service.name`

display.name: P99 Request Duration
display.description: P99 of inbound HTTP request duration

display.name: Request Rate
display.description: Inbound HTTP requests per second

display.name: P95 Request Duration
display.description: P95 of inbound HTTP request duration

display.name: Active Requests
display.description: Number of HTTP requests currently being processed

display.name: Request Duration (P50 / P95 / P99)
display.description: HTTP request duration percentiles over time (P50, P95, P99)

display.name: Request Rate by Status Code
display.description: Request rate grouped by HTTP response status code

display.name: Process Memory (Working Set)
display.description: Physical memory currently mapped to the process context (working set)

display.name: GC Committed Memory
display.description: Committed virtual memory for the managed GC heap

display.name: GC Collections Rate
display.description: Rate of garbage collections grouped by GC generation

display.name: GC Heap Allocation Rate
display.description: Rate of bytes allocated on the managed GC heap

display.name: GC Heap Size
display.description: GC heap size (including fragmentation) as observed at last collection

display.name: GC Pause Time Rate
display.description: Rate of GC pause time (stop-the-world) in seconds per second

display.name: Exceptions Rate by Type
display.description: Rate of exceptions thrown in managed code

display.name: Thread Pool Queue Length
display.description: Number of work items currently queued in the thread pool

display.name: Thread Pool Thread Count
display.description: Number of active thread pool threads

display.name: Thread Pool Work Item Completion Rate
display.description: Rate of work items completed by the thread pool

display.name: Routing Match Attempts
display.description: Rate of routing match attempts grouped by match status (success/failure)

display.name: Memory Pool Allocation Rate
display.description: Rate of bytes allocated from the memory pool (allocation occurs when pooled memory is exhausted)

display.name: Memory Pool Pooled Bytes
display.description: Bytes currently pooled and available for reuse

display.name: Memory Pool Rented Rate
display.description: Rate of bytes rented from the memory pool
